commit.message:
Add continuous benchmarks

Add GitHub Actions workflow to run continuous benchmarks and publish to a tracking website.

Move benchmarks

Publish to subdirectory.

Add continuous benchmarks (#1903)

Add GitHub Actions workflow to run continuous benchmarks and publish to a tracking website.

Add notice for results

Add a step summary with a link to the results.

Bump eslint from 9.8.0 to 9.9.0 in /src/API (#1905)

Bumps [eslint](https://github.com/eslint/eslint) from 9.8.0 to 9.9.0.
- [Release notes](https://github.com/eslint/eslint/releases)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/eslint/eslint/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/eslint/eslint/compare/v9.8.0...v9.9.0)

---
updated-dependencies:
- dependency-name: eslint
  dependency-type: direct:development
  update-type: version-update:semver-minor
...

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>
Co-authored-by: dependabot[bot] <49699333+dependabot[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

Rename secret

Rename secret for benchmarks.

Bump Verify.Xunit from 26.1.6 to 26.2.0 in the xunit group (#1907)

Bumps the xunit group with 1 update: [Verify.Xunit](https://github.com/VerifyTests/Verify).


Updates `Verify.Xunit` from 26.1.6 to 26.2.0
- [Release notes](https://github.com/VerifyTests/Verify/releases)
- [Commits](https://github.com/VerifyTests/Verify/compare/26.1.6...26.2.0)

---
updated-dependencies:
- dependency-name: Verify.Xunit
  dependency-type: direct:production
  update-type: version-update:semver-minor
  dependency-group: xunit
...

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>
Co-authored-by: dependabot[bot] <49699333+dependabot[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

Move benchmark artifacts

Output the artifacts to the root of the repository.

Simplify benchmarks name

Remove "Benchmarks" suffix.

Add more benchmarks

- Add benchmarks for rendering the homepage and the version.
- Refactor benchmarks to move server to its own class.

Remove web SDK from benchmarks

Remove the web SDK from the benchmarks project so that the artifact directory is not overridden.

Remove redundant files (#1912)

- Remove files that are now served from CDN.
- Update favicon.ico.

Consume .NET nightly builds

Update to the latest nightly build of .NET 9.

Bump OpenApi.Extensions
Update to latest version of MartinCostello.OpenApi.Extensions from NuGet.org.

Consume .NET daily builds

Add NuGet feed for .NET 9 pre-release packages.

Update .NET SDK to 9.0.100-rc.1.24413.1 (#1918)

* Fix build
Pick up changes from martincostello/openapi-extensions#51.

* Fix tests

Update OpenAPI snapshots. I'm not sure if the first two changes are correct though.
